title: Delightful Portuguese Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful Portuguese-inspired dish featuring tender dumplings and a variety of fresh ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine floral water, tender all-purpose flour, and portuguese salt.
Knead the dough until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a few peas in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the peas to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and cook the dumplings until they are golden brown on both sides.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
